one_must_read_paper.title: DataFlow: An LLM-Driven Framework for Unified Data Preparation and Workflow Automation in the Era of Data-Centric AI
one_must_read_paper.reason: LLM-driven data prep framework with high architecture and interview value.

three_skim_papers.title: Mem0: Building Production-Ready AI Agents with Scalable Long-Term Memory
three_skim_papers.reason: Strong architecture and interview value for memory-augmented agents.

three_skim_papers.title: Code as Agent Harness
three_skim_papers.reason: Unified view of code as agent harness; high build potential.

three_skim_papers.title: AutoDev: Automated AI-Driven Development
three_skim_papers.reason: Automated AI-driven development; high build potential and interview value.

one_architecture_takeaway: Use Mem0: Building Production-Ready AI Agents with Scalable Long-Term Memory to practice extracting system boundaries, data flow, and evaluation signals.
one_interview_talking_point: Explain why the paper matters for AI engineer system design, not just its headline result.
one_project_idea: Build a small demo inspired by Mem0: Building Production-Ready AI Agents with Scalable Long-Term Memory with fixed inputs, logged traces, and pass/fail criteria.

reviewedFiles.title: Mem0: Building Production-Ready AI Agents with Scalable Long-Term Memory
